creator: pirzyk@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #4)

As of a bit ago it *was* a problem related to upgrading ncurses-6.0_3 to 6.0.0s20171007* but seems to have been fixed now (probably in pkg 1.10.4).

I am closing this and if I find a new case I will open up a new ticket.
